title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at InfraMantra

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at InfraMantra
jsonLd.description:
InfraMantra, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About InfraMantra:
InfraMantra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with InfraMantra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
